response_parsed.Precondition: The right side of box_1 is reachable, and there is sufficient free table space to the right of the box stack so box_1 can be slid off box_2 without colliding with other objects.
response_parsed.Postcondition: box_1 is displaced to the right and no longer on top of box_2, leaving box_2 unobstructed from above.

response_parsed.Precondition: box_2 is unobstructed (box_1 removed), and there is enough clearance on both left and right sides for both end-effectors to make contact and gain stable control of box_2 without slipping.
response_parsed.Postcondition: box_2 is securely braced and controlled between both end-effectors (a non-claw grasp substitute) and is no longer free to slide on the table.
